fdiccaform.label: Bank and Consumer Response Team
fdiccaform.notes: Authorization is treated as required in the prototype; the field matrix observed the checkbox as present but did not flag it as a required field.

fdiccommentform.label: Office of the Ombudsman
fdiccommentform.notes: The prototype asks for desired-resolution details only on report-style topics where a remedy is material.

fdicbaform.label: Small Business Banking Team
fdicbaform.notes: Confirm email matches the field matrix, and authorization is treated as required in the prototype even though the matrix only observed the checkbox as present.

fdicdiform.label: Deposit Insurance Specialist Team
fdicdiform.notes: Authorization is treated as required in the prototype even though the matrix only observed the checkbox as present.

fdicdirform.label: Data and Directory Support Team
fdicdirform.notes: This lightweight DIR path collects only identity and narrative fields.

fidciaform.label: Interagency Appraisal Review Team
fidciaform.notes: Appraisal-specific fields and authorization are added in P4. Property street and city are required in the prototype; conditional logic by role deferred to production.

fdicdimcomplaintform.label: Insured Status Review Team
fdicdimcomplaintform.notes: The prototype asks for desired-resolution details only on report-style insured-status concerns where a remedy is material.

requestformDepositor.label: Failed Bank Depositor Services Team
requestformDepositor.notes: Subtype handling and failed-bank identification are added in P2. The prototype now treats failed-bank identification as required to support accurate routing.

fdicLienRelease.label: Lien and Loan Documents Team
fdicLienRelease.notes: The observed requestform lien-release family shares the seven-field failed-bank baseline, with failed-bank identification added in P2. The prototype now treats failed-bank identification as required to support accurate routing.

requestform-RecordsResearch.label: Failed Bank Records Research Team
requestform-RecordsResearch.notes: Document-request details and failed-bank identification are added in P2. The prototype now treats failed-bank identification as required to support accurate routing.

requestform-AssetManagement.label: Failed Bank Asset Management Team
requestform-AssetManagement.notes: Failed-bank identification and asset-specific subtype routing are added in P2. The prototype now treats failed-bank identification as required to support accurate routing.

powerofattorneyform.label: Failed Bank Limited Power of Attorney Team
powerofattorneyform.notes: The observed form shares the seven-field failed-bank baseline, with failed-bank identification added in P2. The prototype now treats failed-bank identification as required to support accurate routing.

recordsdestructionform.label: Failed Bank Records Custody Team
recordsdestructionform.notes: The observed form shares the seven-field failed-bank baseline, with failed-bank identification added in P2. The prototype now treats failed-bank identification as required to support accurate routing.

prefilled.subject: Request certification of a bank merger or name change

paAgreement.label: Purchase & Assumption Agreement
paAgreement.description: View the FDIC Failed Bank List to find Purchase & Assumption Agreements.

helpdeskform.label: FFIEC Help Desk
helpdeskform.description: Use the FFIEC Help Desk for Central Data Depository, Call Report, Call Data, and UBPR questions.

fdicGeneralInfo.label: FDIC.gov information
fdicGeneralInfo.description: Visit FDIC.gov for general information, hours, deposit insurance basics, and FAQs.

fdiccatalog.label: FDIC Catalog
fdiccatalog.description: Use the FDIC catalog to order printed supplies and materials.
